news.t: Global Dividends in Focus: Navigating Volatility With Fidelity's FIDI

holdings.infoBox: FIDI is an equity ETF with a total of 122 individual holdings. The top holdings are TotalEnergies SE stock at 3.54%, Equinor ASA at 3.46%, Enbridge at 2.81%, Canadian Natural Resources at 2.80%, and Klépierre at 2.75%.

overview.description: The Fidelity International High Dividend ETF (FIDI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a high-dividend, multi-factor index of large- and mid-cap stocks from developed markets ex-US. FIDI was launched on Jan 16, 2018 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Global Dividends in Focus: Navigating Volatility With Fidelity's FIDI
data.text: International exposure continues to pique investor interest as market volatility ensues. That said, the Fidelity International High Dividend ETF (FIDI) is designed to provide investors with a strategi...
